title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 254.075 - State-owned lands, exemptions for
text:
254.075.  State-owned lands, exemptions for. — State-owned lands, used by the commission and classified as forest cropland will not be subject to any ad valorem tax nor subject to any penalties if removed from the forest cropland classification.
(L. 1974 H.B. 1210, A.L. 2018 S.B. 627 & 925)
